description: Vintage floral print on classic Indian sandals from catwalk. The brand combines a minimal style with classic vintage with this pair. Wear this with boho ensembles or with ethnic wear.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a strap for the midfootSynthetic leather toe holderSilica gel beading on the floral straps Ergonomically designed footbed with mild padding for instep comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper in the heel region for comfortOutsoleOutsole with mild heel shoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
